footer.tagline: Real-time AI voice tutoring — learn any subject through natural conversations.

hero.title: Learn anything through natural voice conversations
hero.description: TutorForge pairs you with AI companions that listen, respond, and help you practice out loud — from science and coding to languages and more.
hero.highlight1: Real-time voice conversations with AI tutors
hero.promoTitle: Learn confidently through real voice practice
hero.promoDescription: AI-powered tutoring that helps you speak, explain ideas out loud, and build skills across any subject.

home.featuredGuestDesc: Try a public AI tutor — sign in to save your progress.
home.welcomeDesc: Pick a companion, start a voice session, and review your progress whenever you are ready.
home.readyDesc: Create a free account to build companions, save sessions, and track your progress on My Journey.
home.popularDesc: Explore AI tutors and pick a lesson to start learning through voice.
home.featuredAuthDesc: Hand-picked tutors to get you started quickly.
home.activityDesc: Pick up where you left off or build something new.
home.noSessions: No sessions yet. Launch a companion to start learning.

pricing.metaDescription: Compare TutorForge plans — Basic Plan, Core Learner, and Pro Companion.
pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Compare plans and features. Billing and upgrades are managed on the Subscription page.
pricing.signedInNote: You are signed in. To switch plans or update payment, use Subscription — the cards below are for comparison only.
pricing.included1: Real-time voice tutoring powered by Vapi
pricing.included3: Session replay when transcripts are saved
pricing.included4: Secure sign-in and account management via Clerk
pricing.billingDesc: Read the FAQ for plan limits, companion quotas, and how Clerk billing works.
pricing.footerNote: Annual billing options appear on the Subscription page when available through Clerk.

companionForm.sessionLocaleHelp: The tutor will primarily speak and listen in this language during voice sessions.

myJourney.title: My Journey
myJourney.description: Track your learning progress, streaks, and review flashcards from past sessions.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your preferences, subscription, and account.
settings.languageHelp: Applies to menus, pages, and dashboard text.
settings.subscriptionDesc: Your plan and voice-minute usage for this billing period.
settings.accountDesc: Email, password, and profile — managed securely through Clerk.
settings.remindersDesc: Get a gentle email when you have not practiced for a few days. Unsubscribe anytime from the email footer.

marketplace.adminDesc: Approve or reject companion listings submitted for the public marketplace.
marketplace.noMarketplace: No marketplace companions match your filters.

report.title: Progress Report
report.description: Your learning activity, placement results, and quiz progress in one view.
report.assessmentDesc: Placement tests and session quizzes from your account.

charts.title: Trends over time
charts.description: Weekly study activity and placement score progress.
charts.empty: Complete voice sessions or placement tests to see trends.
charts.noSessions: No sessions in the last 8 weeks yet.
charts.singlePlacement: Latest placement score: {score}%. Take another test to see a trend line.

usage.title: Plan usage
usage.description: Voice minutes used this billing month on your current plan.

placementBySubject.title: Placement by subject
placementBySubject.description: Average scores and latest level per subject.

assessment.title: Assessment
assessment.description: Take a placement test to find your level, then review quizzes from past voice sessions.
assessment.placementDesc: Answer AI-generated questions to estimate your current level in a subject.
assessment.noApiKey: Placement tests require GEMINI_API_KEY to be configured.
assessment.generateError: Could not generate placement test. Please try again.
assessment.saveError: Could not save your results. Run migration 019-placement-assessments.sql if this is a new install.
assessment.hubDesc: Placement results and session quizzes in one place.
assessment.hubEmpty: No quizzes yet. Complete a placement test or finish a voice session with a generated quiz.

classroom.title: Classrooms
classroom.description: Create classes, invite students, assign companions, and track progress.
classroom.privacyNote: Teachers see session counts and minutes only — not student transcripts.

progressReport.title: Class progress report
progressReport.description: Aggregate activity for {name} — sessions and minutes only.
progressReport.activeStudents: {active} of {total} students have completed at least one session.

assistant.title: TutorForge Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Help using the platform
assistant.welcome: Ask me how to use TutorForge — companions, voice sessions, classroom, billing, and more.
assistant.suggestion1: How do I start a voice session?
assistant.suggestion2: What is the difference between plans?
assistant.sendError: Could not get a reply. Please try again.
assistant.rateLimited: Too many messages. Try again in {seconds}s.
assistant.signInPrompt: Sign in to chat with the assistant.
